task: Implement Delete Book dropdown/action for TwelveReader player and Continue Listening.
acceptance_criteria: Backend exposes DELETE /api/v1/books/{bookId} and removes book metadata plus stored book artifacts idempotently enough for UI use.
Player top-bar three-dot button opens a native in-app dropdown/menu with Delete Book.
Continue Listening three-dot button opens the same kind of dropdown/menu with Delete Book without triggering card navigation.
Deletion asks for confirmation, calls backend, invalidates/refetches book queries, clears playback if needed, and navigates away from deleted player.
Go tests and web build/type checks pass or any failure is documented with cause.
